title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | July 9, 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Best PSU bank to buy on weakness, without any doubt.
recommendations.detail: Among PSU banks, SBI is the best stock to buy on weakness. As SBI's subsidiaries go for IPOs one by one (SBI Funds Management IPO band 545-574), SBI's intrinsic value keeps rising. He said to focus on it without any doubt.
Tata Steel's take-off is good, with production reportedly up more than 11%. If a rally comes in metal stocks (dependent on West Asia developments), Tata Steel can also perform.

recommendations.note: July 11 board meet for preferential issue to Japanese partner AJI; keep on watch list.
recommendations.detail: The board meets Saturday July 11 to approve a preferential issue giving more stake to its Japanese technology partner AJI, with promoter Nageshwar Rao investing Rs 70 crore. Pricing will be market-linked and unknown yet. He called it a definitely interesting company to keep on the watch list, and separately advised holding winning stocks like it.

recommendations.note: Fundamentally sound; corrected on weak quarter; will return to old rate - no need to worry.
recommendations.detail: Hitachi Energy corrected from its high to 38,000 because the last quarter result was very weak, but it is fundamentally sound with low liquidity (a high-priced stock, so moves are sharp). He said hold - it will return to the old rate, and cited Jefferies' target of Rs 45,000 with a Hold rating. No need to worry.

recommendations.note: Good EMS company but looks weak; wait for Q1 commentary, consider switching to Cine SJS.
recommendations.detail: PG Electroplast is doing well in the EMS space but struggles to sustain above its prior top after crashes (fell ~800 to 500 last Sep/Oct and keeps getting sold near 800, then down to 600). Recovery does not look fast. He suggested waiting for the Q1 commentary before deciding, said the stock looks weak, and noted one could have shifted into Cine SJS (already up).

recommendations.note: Exit on the rally; use a small rally toward 180 as an exit opportunity.
recommendations.detail: MRPL should be exited in the rally. At current levels he would use even a very small rally toward 180 as an opportunity to exit.

recommendations.note: Results disappointing; relief rallies fizzle; not a good 2-year investment.
recommendations.detail: Asked about investing Rs 10 lakh for two years, he said it may not be a great investment. The stock had a lot of interest in the past as a new-generation name, but results have been disappointing from time to time, so even a relief rally will fizzle out. He does not think it is a right choice for the next two years.

recommendations.note: Good long-term buy; watch results; careful with entry in a corrective market.
recommendations.detail: Fractal Analytics is a good long-term investment that one can buy. He cautioned to watch the results and, since the market is in a corrective mode, to be careful with the entry point.
Sai Parentals is a good long-term investment that one can buy, alongside Fractal Analytics. He again cautioned to watch the results and be careful with the entry point given the corrective market.

recommendations.note: Prominent power-transmission/HVDC-transformer name; momentum high; can buy.
recommendations.detail: KSH International is a name heard a lot in the power-transmission / HVDC-transformer space, and the momentum is high. He said family members can buy it.

recommendations.note: Good stock but momentum stock; safer near 13,000; accumulate on dips.
recommendations.detail: Apar Industries has fallen from ~17,000 to ~14,000 and is without doubt a good stock, but it is also a momentum stock, so be careful with the entry point. He said buying closer to 13,000 would be safer and one can start accumulating on dips down to about 13,000. It is one of the largest winding-wire manufacturers.

recommendations.note: Don't average a 10% loss; short-term bank rally likely done; exit on rally near 165.
recommendations.detail: He questioned averaging just for a 10% loss unless the fundamental story changes. He is skeptical the rally in short-term banks is complete; Union Bank went past 200 in March and corrected continuously since. He would exit in the rally, likely near 165.

recommendations.note: Definitely buy; accumulate on every decline.
recommendations.detail: He said definitely buy Shriram Finance here, as one can accumulate on every decline. All NBFCs are available on dips and it is too much to ignore now.

recommendations.note: Will outperform HDFC Life; largest bank-backed insurer with distribution edge.
recommendations.detail: Between HDFC Life and SBI Life, SBI Life will definitely outperform. It is backed by the largest bank, and banks have an advantage plus an online-marketing skill set to sell aggressively. The stock ran up to 2000 and has since corrected moderately to 1800.

recommendations.note: Insurance sector not very bullish; SBI Life is the better stock.
recommendations.detail: The insurance sector is not so bullish and the two are hard to compare, but SBI Life is the better stock. HDFC Life is a hold in comparison.
Graphite India should be exited when it rallies. He separately noted the company's German unit may be slightly weak due to a closure.

recommendations.note: High-dividend, low-volatility steady stock; okay for ~20% medium-to-long-term returns.
recommendations.detail: LIC Housing Finance is a high-dividend, steady, low-volatility stock. For an investor happy with around 20% returns over the medium to long term, it can be bought at this rate. Financials of the space are fine even though the market has lost some fancy.

recommendations.note: Sitting on 50% profit - exit on the rally.
recommendations.detail: For a holder sitting on 50% profit, Zomato should be exited on the rally that is going to come.

recommendations.note: Risky dark-horse contractor with a possible nuclear angle; a rally could recover losses.
recommendations.detail: HCC is a dark-horse contractor and a risky bet, possibly linked to nuclear. Whenever a nuclear story surfaces, HCC's name comes up and a rally then could help recover the 24% loss - so hold for that.
